## Summary

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New diagnostic tool
- [ ] Enhancement to existing tool
- [ ] Infrastructure (dispatch, kits, mode system)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `wtf --help` still works
- [ ] `wtf list` discovers all tools
- [ ] `wtf restarted --version` dispatches correctly
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] New tool has a `.wtf.json` manifest
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
